name: nsd-nusantara-spiritual-donation
description: Platform donasi darurat, transparansi dana, pengajuan bantuan, dan konseling NSD.

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n API,FLUTTER -c blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:flutter"
scripts.build: npm run build:api && npm run build:flutter
scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run test:flutter
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:api && npm run analyze:flutter
